# Neve

Foamy shampoo for deep cleansing

Neve is the active foam car shampoo with a dense, full-bodied foam that durably adheres to the bodywork.

The main features:

- Snow effect: when used, it creates a thick and full-bodied foam that durably adheres to the bodywork to reduce the friction of car-wash brushes or the mitt, thus minimising the formation of micro-scratches.

- Deep cleaning: it can remove all types of dirt and road contaminants.

- Carefully formulated: the product contains no added sodium hydroxide, phosphates and NTA*.

- Suitable for all vehicles: it can be used on all types of vehicles including sports cars, utility vehicles, vans, camper vans, trucks and motorbikes.

- Floral fragrance: it leaves a pleasant scent after each application.

*May contain traces.

Read more 

![image](https://www.fra-ber.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/neve-di-fra-ber-819x1024.jpg) 

![image](https://www.fra-ber.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/neve-di-fra-ber-819x1024.jpg) 

![image](https://www.fra-ber.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/neve-di-fra-ber-819x1024.jpg) 

### Directions for use

- Dilute in water 1:25 – 1:50, you can reach 1:500 for frequent washes, wash with a glove and rinse thoroughly.

- Foam lance: from 1:2 to 1:12, 1:19 used as a pre-wash for weekly dirt.

- Pump: 10-40 pumpings 6 l/h pump capacity 5-40 ml consumption per cycle.

- Dosatron: 0.2-2%.

- Sprayer: 1:50 to 1:500.
